action.reasoning: Observation: Best test acc 78.47%. Pseudo-labeling didn't help. Mixup too aggressive in Phase 1. Analysis: Need to go back to what worked (iter 4 approach) and improve it. Key: longer Phase 1, gentler Phase 2, better loss. Decision: Rewrite training with ELR loss, longer Phase 1 (20 epochs), Phase 2 with very low backbone LR, no mixup initially. Also try label smoothing CE.
